name: Deeper Book Imbalance with Momentum Filter
hypothesis: While obi_1 is extremely powerful, deeper book pressure might offer a complementary signal. iter007_deep_book_pressure (obi_10) failed on its own. This spec hypothesizes that a deeper imbalance (obi_5) is predictive, but only when confirmed by positive short-term price momentum, filtering out non-trending states.
mutation_note: iter007_deep_book_pressure, which used obi_10 alone, failed. This spec swaps the feature to a less deep but still significant obi_5 and adds the successful momentum filter from iter006_strong_obi_momentum_ensemble to improve precision.
